1333.reason: [Error: Should be stmt.setStmts(stmt1) instead of stmt.setStmts(stmt). This causes the for loop body to be set as the stmt itself, leading to infinite recursion or incorrect AST structure.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Logical Error] Incorrectly adds the current 'stmt' object to its own list instead of the newly parsed 'stmt1'. This leads to incorrect AST construction and potential infinite recursion during traversal.

693.reason: Potential NullPointerException: accessing this.cnt + 2 without bounds checking. If the token stream ends before this index, get() returns null, causing a crash when calling getLexType(). Additionally, the lookahead logic is flawed as it does not verify if cnt+1 is an identifier before checking for '('.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.25 , reason:  [Runtime Error] Accessing index this.cnt + 2 without bounds checking may throw NullPointerException or IndexOutOfBoundsException if near the end of the token list.

233.reason: [This line incorrectly advances to the next character before checking if it's a digit, causing single-digit numbers to be skipped or misread]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This line incorrectly advances to the next character before checking if it's a digit, causing single-digit numbers to be skipped or misread]

242.reason: [This block fails to handle single-digit numbers at the end of input because it requires `this.pos < this.line.length()` to enter digit parsing, but then immediately accesses `this.line.charAt(this.pos)` without checking bounds. Also, the loop condition `this.pos + 1 <= line.length()` causes premature termination when parsing multi-digit numbers at the end of input.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This block fails to handle single-digit numbers at the end of input because it requires `this.pos < this.line.length()` to enter digit parsing, but then immediately accesses `this.line.charAt(this.pos)` without checking bounds. Also, the loop condition `this.pos + 1 <= line.length()` causes premature termination when parsing multi-digit numbers at the end of input.]
